The description for this webinar has changed. ----------------------------------------------------------- Hello Benjamin Barber, thanks for registering for "2026 RED SKY ALLIANCE REDSHORT REPORTING." Welcome to our REDSHORT webinar. 'RED' As In Something Important From Red Sky Alliance & 'SHORT' As In Once A Week In 10 Minutes Or Less. %0D%0A%0D%0AAPRIL 8TH, REDSHORT — BLOCKING THE CLICKFIX QUICK FIXES — ClickFix, a social engineering technique designed to trick users into "fixing" problems, has become a dominant attack vector in recent weeks. Apple has recently released an update to the Terminal application, warning users against pasting potentially malicious commands related to ClickFix attacks. In this week's REDSHORT, we'll provide an overview of ClickFix attacks, highlight recent events related to them, and share key takeaways/risk implications to keep in mind moving forward. Join Us To Find Out More. Please send your questions, comments and feedback to: pbierau@redskyalliance.com *********************************************************** After registering, you will receive a confirmation email containing information about joining the webinar. *********************************************************** This webinar meets 8 times. Wed, Apr 8, 2026 6:30 AM - 7:00 AM PDT Wed, Apr 15, 2026 6:30 AM - 7:00 AM PDT Wed, Apr 22, 2026 6:30 AM - 7:00 AM PDT Wed, Apr 29, 2026 6:30 AM - 7:00 AM PDT Wed, May 6, 2026 6:30 AM - 7:00 AM PDT Wed, May 13, 2026 6:30 AM - 7:00 AM PDT Wed, May 20, 2026 6:30 AM - 7:00 AM PDT Wed, May 27, 2026 6:30 AM - 7:00 AM PDT 1. Click the button to join the webinar at the specified time and date: https://global.gotowebinar.com/join/5207428251321676122/685641350 https://link.gotowebinar.com/email-welcome?role=attendee&source=registrationConfirmationEmail&language=english&experienceType=CLASSIC Note: This link is unique to you and should not be shared. If you cannot click the button, right-click it to copy and paste the link directly into your browser. Before joining, be sure to check system requirements to avoid any connection issues. 2. Choose one of the following audio options:

To use your computer's audio:

When the webinar begins, you will be connected to audio using your computer's microphone and speakers (VoIP). A headset is recommended.

or To use your telephone: If you prefer to use your phone, you must select "Use Telephone" after joining the webinar and call in using the numbers below.
